crons.name: heartbeat
crons.prompt: Read HEARTBEAT.md and AGENTS.md. Update heartbeat, check inbox/tasks, write memory, review blocked automations, and continue the highest-priority safe automation-builder task.

crons.name: automation-backlog-review
crons.prompt: Create or update a task for automation backlog review. Read automations/registry.json, automations/specs, and .claude/skills/automation-discovery/SKILL.md. Identify stale candidates, missing blockers, and next safe local-first actions. Do not execute external or production automations without approval.

crons.name: runbook-quality-review
crons.prompt: Create or update a task for runbook quality review. Read .claude/skills/automation-runbook/SKILL.md, inspect automations/runbooks and automations/runs, flag missing tests, rollback, observability, owner, approval gates, and credential blockers. Write findings to memory and registry.
